loop1.title: Context Rail Header (Overview / Section / Feeder)
loop1.note: Showing total active power and voltage/current stats for Panel 1A's fed feeders (GIC-01-N3 to GIC-02-N7); GIC-02-N6 and GIC-02-N7 are dark (no data).

loop1.title: Real Time Monitoring (Feeder Heatmap)
loop1.note: Showing total active power, power factor, kVA, kVAr, current, voltage, and unbalance for all feeders; Load % is omitted because the panel members lack a rated_kva nameplate to calculate the percentage.

loop1.title: Total Feeder Consumption / Supply
loop1.note: Showing total active power consumption from outgoing feeders — panel capacity (denominator) is unknown for this asset, so consumed percentage is not calculated.

loop1.title: Consumption Trend / Supply Trend
loop1.note: Showing panel aggregate consumption trend from 6 active outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and honest-blanked.
